verdict.reasoning: FixedEtherVault.withdrawAll() is protected by the noReentrant modifier and, more importantly, zeroes userBalances[msg.sender] before making the external call to msg.sender.call{value: balance} (lines 23-30 in FixedEtherVault.sol). The sibling function transfer() updates balances without any external call, but because withdrawAll() follows checks-effects-interactions and reentrancy is blocked by the guard in Dependencies.sol, there is no cross-function reentrancy path. Slither also reported no reentrancy findings, which is consistent with the source.
